task: P4-01S — Evidence-First Data Foundation & Phase 1 Readiness Audit
evidence_method: Direct source file inspection + SQLite DB schema analysis + test file review
overall_phase1_status: PARTIAL — T-01 and T-02 are PARTIAL; T-03 and T-04 are DONE; T-05 is DEPRECATED_OR_NEEDS_REDESIGN

T-01.title: Lane-based scheduler + heartbeat
T-01.summary: 4-layer scheduler exists and is functional. However it uses 'layer' terminology not 'lane', and there is no explicit heartbeat mechanism (periodic liveness ping, dead-letter detection, or watchdog).
evidence_found: src/lib/training/TrainingScheduler.ts — implements 4 layers: INTRADAY_MONITOR (every 30min), DAILY_CYCLE, NIGHTLY_OPT, WEEKLY_DEEP
src/lib/training/TrainingSchedulerTypes.ts — type definitions for SchedulerLayer, LayerConfig
JobRunLog table: 315 total runs, 269 success, 34 skipped, 10 failed, 2 running across 22 distinct job names
JobRunLog has startedAt + completedAt fields — partial observability
missing: No explicit heartbeat mechanism (liveness ping to monitoring endpoint)
No dead-letter detection for stuck 'running' jobs (2 jobs stuck in 'running' state in DB)
No watchdog that restarts failed layers
Roadmap calls for 'lane' isolation — current architecture uses shared layer queue without lane boundaries
T-01.roadmap_success_criteria: Scheduler runs daily without manual intervention; heartbeat visible in Daily Ops Report
T-01.gap_analysis: Heartbeat and watchdog components missing. 2 stuck 'running' jobs in DB indicates absence of dead-job cleanup.

T-02.title: Unified freshness guard + dataCoverage write
T-02.summary: freshnessState() function exists in AutonomousDataLayer.ts. dataCoverage writes occur in the stocks detail route. However, there is no unified FreshnessGuard class, no centralized freshness registry, and no automatic stale-data blocking.
evidence_found: src/lib/autonomous/AutonomousDataLayer.ts — freshnessState() function, 149 lines
src/app/api/stocks/[id]/detail/route.ts — dataCoverage writes when data fetched
DataCoverage table exists in schema with fields: stockId, source, lastUpdated, tradingDaysAvailable
missing: No single FreshnessGuard class or module
No centralized registry that gates data access when coverage < threshold
No automatic P4 guard that blocks analysis when InstitutionalChip < 500 trading days
No freshness alarm / alert to Daily Ops Report when source goes stale
T-02.roadmap_success_criteria: Freshness guard gates all data reads; stale data raises alert in Daily Ops Report; dataCoverage written after every sync
T-02.gap_analysis: dataCoverage writes exist per-stock. But no system-wide freshness gate or automatic stale alert.

T-03.title: Daily Ops Report v1
T-03.summary: Daily Ops Report fully implemented with backend engine, API route, and frontend page. Evidence of functional report pipeline.
evidence_found: src/app/api/report/daily/route.ts — GET endpoint for daily report
src/lib/report/DailyReportEngine.ts — report generation engine
src/app/report/daily/page.tsx — frontend page for Daily Ops Report
SyncLog table: 91 MarketIndices calls, 89 DailyQuotes, 61 RealRevenue, 61 StockMetrics, 58 BasicInfo — shows active sync history
missing: Heartbeat status missing from report (T-01 dependency)
Fresh data warnings not surfaced (T-02 dependency)
T-03.roadmap_success_criteria: Daily Ops Report renders in browser with sync status, freshness state, and scheduler health
T-03.gap_analysis: Core functionality DONE. Dependent features (heartbeat, freshness alarm) awaiting T-01/T-02 completion.

T-04.title: LLM hard-off / safe-run + missing-taskId alert
T-04.summary: LLM execution policy fully implemented with hard-off / safe-run modes and missing-taskId alert. Evidence in source and test files.
evidence_found: src/lib/agent-orchestrator/llmExecutionPolicy.ts — LlmExecutionMode = 'safe-run' | 'hard-off' type + enforcement logic
src/app/components/LlmAuditPanel.tsx — UI panel showing current LLM mode
src/lib/agent-orchestrator/__tests__/taskAttribution.test.ts — COPILOT_MISSING_TASK_ID alert test case
181/181 tests passing as of P3-14 handover (20260505.md)
T-04.roadmap_success_criteria: LLM calls blocked in hard-off mode; missing taskId raises COPILOT_MISSING_TASK_ID alert; mode visible in UI
T-04.gap_analysis: No gaps found. All three criteria met.

T-05.title: Walk-forward backtest skeleton
T-05.summary: A single-symbol rule-only walk-forward implementation exists with 522 rows of results for H001-H012. However, H001-H012 were retired/archived in P3-14. The existing WalkForwardResult schema and data are no longer valid for active signals. CTO recommendation is to DEPRECATE and redesign as portfolio walk-forward (P4-04).
evidence_found: WalkForwardResult table: 522 rows
WalkForwardResult covers signals: chip_accumulation, regime_shift, risk_cluster, strong_alpha, theme_diffusing, topic_surging
All above signals correspond to H001-H012 retired hypotheses
outputs/stock_research_program/walk_forward_results.json confirms H001-H012 walk-forward data
cto_analysis_20260506.md: CTO classified rule-only B-08 walk-forward as DEPRECATE in CTO component audit
missing: No existing skeleton for P4-04 format: rolling window, portfolio construction, aggregate metric output
WalkForwardResult schema too narrow for portfolio-level validation (single-stock focus)
T-05.roadmap_success_criteria: Walk-forward skeleton runs 500d in-sample + 200d OOS for rule-based signals on full universe
T-05.redesign_recommendation: Deprecate existing single-symbol WalkForwardResult data. Redesign in P4-04 as portfolio walk-forward with cross-sectional basket construction, regime conditioning via T-03 classifier outputs, and portfolio-level metrics (Sharpe, max drawdown, hit rate, turnover). H001-H012 results can be archived but should not be reused.
T-05.deprecation_action: Mark WalkForwardResult rows as deprecated via a migration; or move to archive table before P4-04 begins.

blocking_for_p4: T-01 PARTIAL: No heartbeat means scheduler failures are silent — increases ops risk during P4 data backfills
T-02 PARTIAL: No freshness gate means P4-02/03/04 analyses could run on stale data without warning
T-05 DEPRECATED: Must redesign before P4-04 portfolio backtester can be built
non_blocking_but_notable: T-03 DONE: Daily Ops Report ready but incomplete without T-01 heartbeat and T-02 freshness alarm
T-04 DONE: LLM governance is solid — reduces risk during P4 automation
